code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of (subject, predicate, object) triples about an astronaut
    into a single fluent sentence. Each predicate is rendered with a simple
    template; unknown predicates fall back to a generic “subject predicate object”
    phrasing. All clauses are combined with commas and the final clause is joined
    with “and”.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple templates for known predicates
    templates = {
        "almaMater": "{s} studied at {o}",
        "birthDate": "{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthName": "{s} was originally named {o}",
        "birthPlace": "{s} was born in {o}",
        "dateOfRetirement": "{s} retired in {o}",
        "occupation": "{s} worked as {o}",
        "status": "{s} is {o}",
        "timeInSpace": "{s} spent {o} minutes in space",
        "mission": "{s} flew on the {o} mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "{s} was selected by NASA in {o}",
        "deathDate": "{s} died on {o}",
        "nationality": "{s} was a citizen of {o}",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "{s} served as Chief of the Astronaut Office in {o}",
        "title": "{s}'s title is {o}",
        "ribbonAward": "{s} received the {o} ribbon",
        "operator": "{s} was operated by {o}",
        "backupPilot": "the backup pilot for {s} was {o}",
        "commander": "the commander of {s} was {o}",
        "crewMembers": "the crew members of {s} include {o}",
        "representative": "the representative of {s} is {o}",
        "alternativeName": "{s} is also known as {o}",
        "awards": "{s} received {o} awards",
        "fossil": "{s} is known for the fossil {o}",
        "senators": "{s} is represented by senators {o}",
        "part": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "partsType": "{s} belongs to the {o}",
        "higher": "{s} is higher than {o}",
        "isPartOf": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "bird": "{s} has the state bird {o}",
        "leader": "{s} is led by {o}",
        "affiliation": "{s} is affiliated with {o}",
        "competeIn": "{s} competes in {o}",
        "president": "{s} is presided over by {o}",
        "award": "{s} received the award {o}",
        "deathPlace": "{s} died in {o}",
        "gemstone": "{s} is known for the gemstone {o}",
        "mascot": "{s}'s mascot is {o}",
        "cosparId": "{s} has COSPAR ID {o}",
        "utcOffset": "{s} has a UTC offset of {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
        if tmpl:
            clause = tmpl.format(s=t.subject, o=t.object)
        else:
            # Generic fallback
            clause = f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        # join with commas, last with "and"
        return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

      return f"The {triples[0].predicate} of {triples[0].subject} is {triples[0].object}."
